name: Excessive Network Share Access Failures from a Compromised Host
notes: This rule triggers when repeated failures to access network shares are seen from the same compromised host.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5000752) Failure Audit: A network share object was accessed
when any of Source IP are contained in any of Compromised Hosts - IP
when at least 3 events are seen with the same Source IP in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 3 events are seen with the same Source IP in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Excessive Network Share Access Failures from a Compromised Host on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000752) Failure Audit: A network share object was accessed
AND when any of Source IP are contained in any of Compromised Hosts - IP
AND when at least 3 events are seen with the same Source IP in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Excessive Failed Attempts to Access a Network Shared Resource from a Compromised Host
Event description: Excessive Failed Attempts to Access a Network Shared Resource from a Compromised Host
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
